opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turn a pet-hair-covered couch into a like-new sofa for $42
opportunities.before_state: Worn, stained, pet-hair-covered couch that looks outdated
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, tailored-looking sofa cover that hides stains and repels pet hair
opportunities.why_now: Pinterest home content is spotlighting 'dogs in beautiful homes' aesthetics, and pet-proofing furniture is a constant high-intent search paired with Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission.

opportunities.specific_product: Solar deck post cap & stair lights multipack
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dark, unsafe deck steps become a glowing outdoor space for $24
opportunities.before_state: Dim, unlit deck and stairs that feel unsafe and unfinished at night
opportunities.after_state: Warm-glow solar lights lining every step and post cap for a resort-style patio at night
opportunities.why_now: BHG published two separate pins this week on solar deck and stair lighting sourced directly from Amazon, signaling a purchase-ready summer outdoor trend.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Cluttered desk corner becomes an organized study station for $34
opportunities.before_state: Piles of school supplies and craft materials scattered across a desk or counter
opportunities.after_state: Everything sorted into a mobile rolling cart tucked neatly beside the desk
opportunities.why_now: HGTV Magazine's back-to-school pin (craft cart, study spot) is circulating in early July, just as back-to-school shopping searches begin ramping toward August.

opportunities.specific_product: Sliding barn door hardware kit with door
opportunities.transformation_hook: A plain hallway door becomes a statement barn door for $89
opportunities.before_state: Boring flat hollow-core door blending into the wall
opportunities.after_state: Rustic-modern sliding barn door adding instant character and saving floor space
opportunities.why_now: HGTV.com just featured barn doors as a character-adding trend, and it's a classic high-drama before/after that performs well in Reels.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Outdated bathroom tile gets a designer look for $28, no grout needed
opportunities.before_state: Dated, plain, or chipped bathroom tile that looks tired
opportunities.after_state: Bold mosaic-look peel-and-stick tile transforming the space in an afternoon
opportunities.why_now: Both HGTV and Apartment Therapy are pushing bold bathroom tile stories this week, signaling bathroom refreshes are top-of-mind ahead of fall renovation season.
